loader.HTML:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <title>Members & Seats</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --black: #0A090A;
            --grey-90: #3E3D3E;
            --grey-80: #5A595B;
            --grey-60: #6A696A;
            --grey-40: #A5A4A7;
            --grey-20: #D3D1D5;
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html,
        body {
            height: 100%;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            background-color: #ffffff;
            color: var(--black);
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        }

        /* App Styles */
        #app-root {
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0 20px;
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        /* Header */
        .header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }

        .breadcrumb {
            display: flex;
            width: 1438px;
            height: 64px;
            padding: 0 20px 0 0;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 7px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        /* Hide mobile-only buttons on desktop */
        .mobile-header-actions {
            display: none;
        }

        .breadcrumb-items {
            display: flex;
            align-items: baseline;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .breadcrumb-parent {
            color: var(--grey-80);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 20px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 32px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .breadcrumb-parent:hover {
            color: #8039FD;
        }

        .breadcrumb-separator {
            color: var(--grey-80);
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 400;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .breadcrumb-current {
            color: var(--black);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 20px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 32px;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .seats-counter {
            color: var(--grey-80);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 32px;
            width: 168px;
            display: inline-block;
            margin-left: 6px;
        }

        .seats-counter .used-count {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .header-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 0 8px 0;
        }

        .edit-org-btn {
            display: flex;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            background: #ffffff;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: var(--black);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            white-space: nowrap;
            height: 34px;
        }

        .edit-org-btn:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            border-color: var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
        }

        .edit-org-btn svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        .invite-btn {
            display: flex;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            background: #ffffff;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: var(--black);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            height: 34px;
        }

        .invite-btn:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            border-color: var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
        }

        .invite-btn.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        .invite-btn svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        /* Subtitle */
        .subtitle {
            color: var(--grey-90);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }

        .subtitle.empty-state-active {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        /* Table */
        .table-container {
            border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: visible;
        }

        .table {
            width: 100%;
            min-width: 600px;
            border-collapse: collapse;
        }

        .table-header {
            background: #f9fafb;
        }

        .table-header th {
            padding: 14px 24px;
            text-align: left;
            color: var(--grey-60);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 14px;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }

        /* Column distribution */
        .table-header th:nth-child(1),
        .table tbody td:nth-child(1) {
            width: 40%;
        }

        .table-header th:nth-child(2),
        .table tbody td:nth-child(2) {
            width: 20%;
        }

        .table-header th:nth-child(3),
        .table tbody td:nth-child(3) {
            width: 30%;
        }

        .table-header th:nth-child(4),
        .table tbody td:nth-child(4) {
            width: 10%;
            text-align: right;
        }

        /* Actions column */
        .actions-column {
            width: 10%;
        }

        .delete-btn {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: not-allowed;
            border-radius: 6px;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.15s ease;
            margin-left: auto;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .table tbody tr:not(.no-delete) .delete-btn {
            opacity: 0.3;
            cursor: pointer;
            pointer-events: auto;
        }

        .table tbody tr:not(.no-delete):hover .delete-btn {
            opacity: 0.6;
        }

        .table tbody tr:not(.no-delete) .delete-btn:hover {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .delete-btn:hover svg path {
            stroke: #7c3aed;
        }

        .delete-btn svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        .delete-btn svg path {
            transition: stroke 0.15s ease;
        }

        .table tbody tr {
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        }

        .table tbody tr:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .table tbody tr:hover {
            background: #F0E8FF;
        }

        .table tbody td {
            padding: 16px 24px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--black);
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        /* Member Cell */
        .member-cell {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .avatar {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #7c3aed;
            color: #ffffff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* Email */
        .email {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .member-cell .email {
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        /* Status Badge */
        .status-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            height: 24px;
            padding: 2px 8px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .status-badge.active {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .status-badge.invite_sent {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .status-badge.pending {
            background: #fffbeb;
            color: #92400e;
            border: 1px solid #fde68a;
        }

        /* Mobile: force status badge to new line */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .status-badge {
                display: block;
                width: fit-content;
            }
        }

        /* Invite button below table (for single member state) */
        /* Single member invite container */
        .single-member-invite-container {
            display: none;
            flex: 1;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 16px;
            min-height: 200px;
        }

        .single-member-invite-container.visible {
            display: flex;
        }

        .single-member-invite-title {
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            text-align: center;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 24px;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .table-invite-btn {
            display: flex;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: var(--grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            border: none;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
            height: 30px;
        }

        .table-invite-btn.visible {
            display: inline-flex;
        }

        .table-invite-btn:hover {
            background: #7c3aed;
        }

        .table-invite-btn svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        /* Empty State - only used when truly empty (0 members) */
        .empty-state {
            display: none;
            width: calc(100% + 40px);
            margin-left: -20px;
            margin-right: -20px;
            margin-bottom: -20px;
            flex: 1;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 16px;
            background: #f3f4f6;
        }

        .empty-state.visible {
            display: flex;
        }

        .empty-state-title {
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--grey-90);
            margin: 0;
        }

        .empty-state-btn {
            display: flex;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: #0A090A;
            border: none;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .empty-state-btn:hover {
            background: #7c3aed;
        }

        .empty-state-btn svg {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
        }

        /* Modal Overlay */
        .modal-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 1000;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease, visibility 0.2s ease;
        }

        .modal-overlay.visible {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }

        /* Modal */
        .modal {
            display: flex;
            width: 500px;
            align-items: flex-start;
            border-radius: 12px;
            background: #FFF;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 24px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
            max-width: calc(-16px + 100vw);
            max-height: calc(-16px + 100dvh);
            overflow: hidden;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: space-between;
            user-select: none;
            position: relative;
            transform: scale(0.95);
            transition: transform 0.2s ease, height 0.25s;
        }

        .modal-overlay.visible .modal {
            transform: scale(1);
        }

        .modal-header {
            display: flex;
            padding: 12px 12px 0 0;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            align-items: flex-start;
            align-self: stretch;
            position: relative;
        }

        .modal-close {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--grey-80);
        }

        .modal-close:hover {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .modal-close svg {
            width: 13px;
            height: 13px;
        }

        .modal-title {
            color: var(--black, #0A090A);
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 24px;
            margin: 0 0 8px 0;
        }

        .modal-subtitle {
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            margin: 0 0 16px 0;
        }

        .modal-body {
            padding: 24px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 4px;
            align-self: stretch;
        }

        .form-label {
            color: var(--Grey-60, #6A696A);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 14px;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .form-input {
            display: flex;
            height: 44px;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            align-self: stretch;
            width: 100%;
            border-radius: 4px;
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
            background: #ffffff;
            overflow: hidden;
            color: var(--black);
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            outline: none;
            transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
        }

        .form-input::placeholder {
            overflow: hidden;
            color: var(--grey-60);
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: italic;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
        }

        .form-input:focus {
            border-color: var(--grey-80);
        }

        .modal-footer {
            padding: 24px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 12px;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .btn {
            display: flex;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            white-space: nowrap;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .btn-secondary {
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            color: #2d2d2d;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        .btn-secondary:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            border-color: var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
        }

        .btn-primary {
            background: var(--grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 13px;
        }

        .btn-primary:hover {
            background: #9747FF;
            border-color: #9747FF;
        }

        .btn-primary:disabled {
            background: var(--grey-10, #e5e5e5);
            border: 1px solid var(--grey-10, #e5e5e5);
            color: var(--grey-40, #A5A4A7);
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }


        /* Hide mobile-only role inline on desktop */
        .role-inline-mobile {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Role badge */
        .role-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            height: 24px;
            padding: 2px 0;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            white-space: nowrap;
            border: none;
        }

        .role-badge.admin {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .role-badge.member {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .role-badge.owner {
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .role-badge.clickable {
            cursor: pointer;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            min-height: 32px;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            background: transparent;
            position: relative;
        }

        .role-badge.clickable:hover {
            border-radius: 4px;
            border: 1px solid var(--purple-10, #DECCFF);
            background: var(--purple-2, #F9F6FF);
            padding: 8px 12px;
            margin: -8px -12px;
            height: 32px;
        }

        .role-badge.clickable.open {
            border-radius: 4px;
            border: 1px solid var(--purple-10, #DECCFF);
            background: var(--purple-2, #F9F6FF);
            padding: 8px 12px;
            margin: -8px -12px;
            height: 32px;
        }

        .role-badge-wrapper {
            position: relative;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .role-badge-chevron {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            opacity: 0.6;
        }

        /* Role dropdown */
        .role-dropdown {
            position: absolute;
            top: calc(100% + 12px);
            left: -12px;
            min-width: 100px;
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 12px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
            padding: 4px;
            z-index: 100;
            display: none;
        }

        .role-dropdown.visible {
            display: block;
        }

        .role-dropdown-item {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--black);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        .role-dropdown-item:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
        }

        /* Role-based visibility: hide admin controls for members */
        .role-member .edit-org-btn,
        .role-member .invite-btn,
        .role-member .table-invite-btn,
        .role-member .empty-state-btn,
        .role-member .delete-btn { display: none !important; }

        /* Mobile heading (hidden by default) */
        .mobile-heading {
            display: none;
            color: var(--black);
            font-family: "DM Sans", sans-serif;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 32px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        /* Mobile styles */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            #app-root {
                padding: 0;
                margin: 0;
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
            }

            /* Mobile heading container with border */
            .mobile-heading {
                width: 100%;
                padding: 19px 20px 19px 20px;
                border-bottom: 1px solid var(--grey-20);
                margin: 0 0 16px 0;
                text-align: center;
            }

            /* Hide breadcrumb on mobile */
            .breadcrumb {
                display: none !important;
            }

            /* Show mobile heading */
            .mobile-heading {
                display: block;
            }

            /* Header layout changes */
            .header {
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 0;
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }

            /* Hide desktop header-actions */
            .header-actions {
                display: none !important;
            }

            /* Mobile-only header actions */
            .mobile-header-actions {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                width: 100%;
                padding: 16px;
                gap: 12px;
                background: white;
                order: 1;
            }

            /* Mobile buttons styling */
            .mobile-header-actions .edit-org-btn,
            .mobile-header-actions .invite-btn {
                display: flex;
                height: 54px;
                padding: 4px 16px;
                justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 8px;
                align-self: stretch;
                border-radius: 6px;
                color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
                text-align: right;
                font-family: "DM Sans";
                font-size: 16px;
                font-style: normal;
                font-weight: 400;
                line-height: 24px; /* 150% */
            }

            /* Hide subtitle on mobile */
            .subtitle {
                display: none !important;
            }

            /* Show mobile seats counter below buttons */
            #seats-counter {
                display: none !important;
            }

            #seats-counter-mobile {
                display: block !important;
                width: 100%;
                padding: 0 16px;
                margin: 0 0 4px 0;
                text-align: left;
                order: 2;
                font-weight: 400;
                color: var(--grey-80);
                font-family: "DM Sans";
                font-size: 14px;
                line-height: 32px;
            }

            #seats-counter-mobile .used-count {
                color: var(--black);
                font-weight: 700;
                font-size: 16px;
            }

            /* Table container becomes card container */
            .table-container {
                border: none;
                border-top: none !important;
                border-radius: 0;
                padding: 16px 16px 32px 16px;
                overflow: visible;
                background: transparent;
                order: 3;
            }

            /* Single member invite container - comes after table */
            #single-member-invite-container {
                order: 4;
            }

            /* Hide table header */
            .table-header {
                display: none;
            }

            /* Table becomes block */
            .table {
                display: block;
                min-width: 0;
            }

            /* Tbody becomes flex column */
            .table tbody {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 16px;
            }

            /* Each row becomes a card */
            .table tbody tr {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                border: 1px solid var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
                border-radius: 12.125px;
                padding: 16px;
                background: var(--White, #FFF);
            }

            .table tbody tr:hover {
                background: var(--White, #FFF);
            }

            .table tbody tr:first-child {
                padding: 16px;
            }

            /* All td become flex items */
            .table tbody td {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                padding: 0;
                width: 100% !important;
                border: none;
            }

            /* Email row */
            .table tbody td:nth-child(1) {
                margin-bottom: 4px;
                order: 1;
            }

            /* Hide role td on mobile — shown inline inside status td */
            .table tbody td.role-td {
                display: none !important;
            }

            /* Status td becomes inline row with role + status */
            .table tbody td.status-td {
                display: flex !important;
                flex-direction: row;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 6px;
                width: 100% !important;
                padding-left: 46px;
                margin-top: 2px;
                order: 2;
            }

            /* Show role inline on mobile */
            .role-inline-mobile {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
            }

            /* Comma separator between role and status — only when no dropdown */
            .role-inline-mobile:not(:has(.clickable))::after {
                content: ',';
                margin-right: 2px;
            }

            /* Hide delete button column on mobile */
            .table tbody td:nth-child(4) {
                display: none;
            }

            /* Email styling in mobile - truncate and bold */
            .table tbody td:nth-child(1) .email {
                display: -webkit-box;
                -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
                -webkit-line-clamp: 1;
                overflow: hidden;
                color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
                text-overflow: ellipsis;
                font-family: "DM Sans";
                font-size: 16px;
                font-style: normal;
                font-weight: 700;
                line-height: 24px; /* 150% */
            }

            /* Role badge clickable styling in mobile */
            .role-badge.clickable {
                border-radius: 4px;
                border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
                background: var(--White, #FFF);
                display: inline-flex;
                height: 28px;
                padding: 4px 6px 4px 10px;
                align-items: center;
                align-self: auto;
                margin: 0;
                width: fit-content;
                font-size: 13px;
                color: var(--grey-80);
            }

            /* Non-clickable role badge on mobile */
            .role-badge:not(.clickable) {
                display: inline-flex;
                width: fit-content;
                border: none;
                background: none;
                padding: 0;
                font-size: 13px;
                color: var(--grey-80);
            }

            .role-badge.clickable:hover,
            .role-badge.clickable.open {
                border-radius: 4px;
                border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
                background: var(--White, #FFF);
                padding: 4px 6px 4px 10px;
                margin: 0;
                height: 28px;
            }

            /* Align dropdown to left edge of role badge in mobile */
            .role-dropdown {
                left: 0;
            }

            /* Owner role badge padding in mobile */
            .role-badge.owner {
                padding-left: 0;
            }

            /* Member cell gap in mobile */
            .member-cell {
                gap: 6px;
            }

            /* Ensure last card has bottom border visible */
            .table tbody tr:last-child {
                border-bottom: 1px solid var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            }

            /* Single member invite container - mobile centered layout */
            #single-member-invite-container {
                padding: 0 16px;
                justify-content: center;
            }

            /* Status badge inline on mobile */
            .table tbody .status-badge {
                display: inline-flex !important;
                width: fit-content;
                color: var(--grey-80);
                font-size: 13px;
            }

            /* Role badge inline on mobile */
            .table tbody .role-badge {
                display: inline-flex !important;
                width: fit-content;
            }

            /* Non-clickable role badge — plain text style */
            .role-inline-mobile .role-badge:not(.clickable) {
                border: none;
                background: none;
                padding: 0;
                font-size: 13px;
                color: var(--grey-80);
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- App -->
    <div id="app-root">
        <!-- Mobile heading -->
        <h1 class="mobile-heading">Members & Seats</h1>

        <!-- Header -->
        <div class="header">
            <div class="breadcrumb">
                <div class="breadcrumb-items">
                    <span class="breadcrumb-parent">Settings</span>
                    <span class="breadcrumb-separator">›</span>
                    <span class="breadcrumb-current">Members & Seats</span>
                    <span class="seats-counter" id="seats-counter">0 of 0 seats used</span>
                </div>
                <div class="header-actions">
                    <button class="edit-org-btn" id="edit-org-btn">
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                            <g clip-path="url(#clip0_5195_29840)">
                                <path d="M13 7L9 3" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                <path d="M5.5 14.5L0.5 15.5L1.5 10.5L11.5 0.5L15.5 4.5L5.5 14.5Z" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                            </g>
                            <defs>
                                <clipPath id="clip0_5195_29840">
                                    <rect width="16" height="16" fill="white"/>
                                </clipPath>
                            </defs>
                        </svg>
                        Edit org
                    </button>
                    <button class="invite-btn hidden" id="invite-btn">
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                            <line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>
                            <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
                        </svg>
                        Invite
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Mobile seats counter -->
            <span class="seats-counter" id="seats-counter-mobile" style="display: none;">0 of 0 seats used</span>

            <!-- Mobile-only buttons section -->
            <div class="mobile-header-actions">
                <button class="edit-org-btn" id="edit-org-btn-mobile">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                        <g clip-path="url(#clip0_5332_27690)">
                            <path d="M13 7L9 3" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                            <path d="M5.5 14.5L0.5 15.5L1.5 10.5L11.5 0.5L15.5 4.5L5.5 14.5Z" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                        </g>
                        <defs>
                            <clipPath id="clip0_5332_27690">
                                <rect width="16" height="16" fill="white"/>
                            </clipPath>
                        </defs>
                    </svg>
                    Edit org
                </button>
                <button class="invite-btn" id="invite-btn-mobile">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                        <path d="M8 3V13" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                        <path d="M3 8H13" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                    Invite
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Subtitle -->
        <p id="subtitle" class="subtitle">Manage who has access to
            <span id="subtitle-org-name"></span><span id="subtitle-org-suffix"> organization</span>.</p>

        <!-- Table -->
        <div id="table-container" class="table-container">
            <table class="table">
                <thead class="table-header">
                    <tr>
                        <th>Email</th>
                        <th>Role</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                        <th class="actions-column"></th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody id="members-tbody">
                    <!-- Members will be rendered here -->
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        <!-- Single member invite container -->
        <div class="single-member-invite-container" id="single-member-invite-container">
            <h3 class="single-member-invite-title">Create your team</h3>
            <button class="table-invite-btn" id="table-invite-btn">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                    <path d="M8 3V13" stroke="white" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    <path d="M3 8H13" stroke="white" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                </svg>
                Invite people
            </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Empty State (Below Header) - for truly empty state -->
        <div id="empty-state-page" class="empty-state">
            <h3 class="empty-state-title">Create your team</h3>
            <button class="empty-state-btn" id="empty-state-invite-btn">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>
                    <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
                </svg>
                Invite people
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Invite Modal -->
    <div id="invite-modal" class="modal-overlay">
        <div class="modal">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <button class="modal-close" id="modal-close-btn">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                        <path d="M12 4L4 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                        <path d="M4 4L12 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body">
                <h2 class="modal-title">Invite people to <span id="invite-modal-org-name"></span> organization</h2>
                <p class="modal-subtitle" id="modal-seats-available">You have 1 seat available.</p>
                <label class="form-label" for="email-input">Email addresses</label>
                <input type="text" id="email-input" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter Email">
                <div style="color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E); font-family: 'DM Sans'; font-size: 13px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; line-height: 18px; margin-top: 4px;">Separate multiple with commas</div>
                <div id="email-duplicates" style="display:none; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 13px; color: #dc2626; max-height: 60px; overflow-y: auto;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer">
                <button class="btn btn-secondary" id="modal-cancel-btn">Cancel</button>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" id="modal-send-btn" disabled>Send invites</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Edit Organization Modal -->
    <div id="edit-org-modal" class="modal-overlay">
        <div class="modal">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <button class="modal-close" id="edit-org-modal-close-btn">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                        <path d="M12 4L4 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                        <path d="M4 4L12 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body">
                <h2 class="modal-title">Edit organization</h2>
                <p class="modal-subtitle">Update <span id="edit-modal-org-name"></span> organization details.</p>
                <label class="form-label" for="org-name-input">Organization name</label>
                <input type="text" id="org-name-input" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter organization name" maxlength="150">
                <div id="org-name-error" style="display:none; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 13px; color: #dc2626;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer">
                <button class="btn btn-secondary" id="edit-org-cancel-btn">Cancel</button>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" id="edit-org-save-btn">Save changes</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Component Logic -->
    <script>
        (function() {
            // Private state
            let membersData = [];
            let seatsInfo = { total: 0, used: 0, pricePerSeat: 0, minSeats: 1 };
            let orgName = '';
            let currentUserRole = 'admin';
            let currentUserEmail = '';
            let ownerEmail = '';
            let isInitialized = false;
            let isDataLoaded = false;

            // DOM references
            const appRootEl = document.getElementById('app-root');
            const tbodyEl = document.getElementById('members-tbody');
            const seatsCounterEl = document.getElementById('seats-counter');
            const seatsCounterMobileEl = document.getElementById('seats-counter-mobile');
            const inviteBtnEl = document.getElementById('invite-btn');
            const tableContainerEl = document.getElementById('table-container');
            const subtitleEl = document.getElementById('subtitle');
            const tableInviteBtnEl = document.getElementById('table-invite-btn');
            const singleMemberInviteContainerEl = document.getElementById('single-member-invite-container');

            // Modal DOM references
            const modalEl = document.getElementById('invite-modal');
            const modalCloseBtnEl = document.getElementById('modal-close-btn');
            const modalCancelBtnEl = document.getElementById('modal-cancel-btn');
            const modalSendBtnEl = document.getElementById('modal-send-btn');
            const modalSeatsEl = document.getElementById('modal-seats-available');
            const emailInputEl = document.getElementById('email-input');
            const emailDuplicatesEl = document.getElementById('email-duplicates');

            // Edit org modal DOM references
            const editOrgBtnEl = document.getElementById('edit-org-btn');
            const editOrgModalEl = document.getElementById('edit-org-modal');
            const editOrgModalCloseBtnEl = document.getElementById('edit-org-modal-close-btn');
            const editOrgCancelBtnEl = document.getElementById('edit-org-cancel-btn');
            const editOrgSaveBtnEl = document.getElementById('edit-org-save-btn');
            const orgNameInputEl = document.getElementById('org-name-input');
            const orgNameErrorEl = document.getElementById('org-name-error');

            // Empty state DOM references
            const emptyStatePageEl = document.getElementById('empty-state-page');
            const emptyStateInviteBtnEl = document.getElementById('empty-state-invite-btn');

            // Org name display references
            const subtitleOrgNameEl = document.getElementById('subtitle-org-name');
            const subtitleOrgSuffixEl = document.getElementById('subtitle-org-suffix');
            const inviteModalOrgNameEl = document.getElementById('invite-modal-org-name');
            const editModalOrgNameEl = document.getElementById('edit-modal-org-name');

            // Status display mapping
            const STATUS_LABELS = {
                'active': 'Active',
                'invite_sent': 'Invite sent',
                'pending': 'Pending'
            };

            // Utility: Get initials from name
            function getInitials(name) {
                if (!name) return '??';
                const parts = name.trim().split(/\s+/);
                if (parts.length === 1) {
                    return parts[0].substring(0, 2).toUpperCase();
                }
                return (parts[0][0] + parts[parts.length - 1][0]).toUpperCase();
            }

            // Show edit org modal
            function showEditOrgModal() {
                orgNameInputEl.value = orgName;
                editOrgModalEl.classList.add('visible');
                orgNameInputEl.focus();
            }

            // Hide edit org modal
            function hideEditOrgModal() {
                editOrgModalEl.classList.remove('visible');
                orgNameErrorEl.style.display = 'none';
                editOrgSaveBtnEl.disabled = false;
            }

            // Update org name displays throughout the UI
            function updateOrgNameDisplays() {
                if (orgName) {
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.textContent = orgName;
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.style.fontStyle = 'normal';
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.style.color = '';
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.style.cursor = 'pointer';
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.onmouseenter = function() { this.style.textDecoration = 'underline'; };
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.onmouseleave = function() { this.style.textDecoration = ''; };
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.onclick = showEditOrgModal;
                    subtitleOrgSuffixEl.style.display = '';
                } else {
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.textContent = 'unnamed';
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.style.fontStyle = 'italic';
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.style.color = 'var(--grey-60)';
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.style.cursor = 'pointer';
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.onmouseenter = function() { this.style.textDecoration = 'underline'; };
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.onmouseleave = function() { this.style.textDecoration = ''; };
                    subtitleOrgNameEl.onclick = showEditOrgModal;
                    subtitleOrgSuffixEl.style.display = '';
                }

                const displayName = orgName || 'your';
                inviteModalOrgNameEl.textContent = displayName;
                editModalOrgNameEl.textContent = displayName;
            }

            // Update UI based on member count
            function updateUIState() {
                const memberCount = membersData.length;
                const isSingleMember = memberCount === 1;

                // Show/hide header invite button (always visible when 1+ members)
                if (memberCount >= 1) {
                    inviteBtnEl.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    inviteBtnEl.classList.add('hidden');
                }

                // Show/hide single member invite container (only visible when single member)
                if (isSingleMember) {
                    singleMemberInviteContainerEl.classList.add('visible');
                } else {
                    singleMemberInviteContainerEl.classList.remove('visible');
                }

                // Show/hide empty state (only when 0 members)
                if (memberCount === 0) {
                    tableContainerEl.style.display = 'none';
                    singleMemberInviteContainerEl.classList.remove('visible');
                    emptyStatePageEl.classList.add('visible');
                    subtitleEl.classList.add('empty-state-active');
                } else {
                    tableContainerEl.style.display = 'block';
                    emptyStatePageEl.classList.remove('visible');
                    subtitleEl.classList.remove('empty-state-active');
                }
            }

            // Render the members table
            function renderMembers() {
                const memberCount = membersData.length;
                const isSingleMember = memberCount === 1;

                // Sort members: owner first, current user second, then others
                const sortedMembers = [...membersData].sort((a, b) => {
                    const aIsOwner = ownerEmail && a.email === ownerEmail;
                    const bIsOwner = ownerEmail && b.email === ownerEmail;
                    const aIsCurrent = currentUserEmail && a.email === currentUserEmail;
                    const bIsCurrent = currentUserEmail && b.email === currentUserEmail;

                    // Owner always first
                    if (aIsOwner && !bIsOwner) return -1;
                    if (!aIsOwner && bIsOwner) return 1;

                    // Current user second (if not owner)
                    if (aIsCurrent && !bIsCurrent) return -1;
                    if (!aIsCurrent && bIsCurrent) return 1;

                    return 0;
                });

                tbodyEl.innerHTML = sortedMembers.map((member, index) => {
                    // Only invite_sent members can be deleted
                    const noDeleteClass = (member.status !== 'invite_sent') ? 'no-delete' : '';
                    const isOwner = ownerEmail && member.email === ownerEmail;
                    const memberRole = member.role || 'admin';
                    const roleLabel = isOwner ? 'Owner' : (memberRole === 'admin' ? 'Admin' : 'Member');
                    const badgeClass = isOwner ? 'owner' : memberRole;
                    const isSelf = currentUserEmail && member.email === currentUserEmail;
                    const canChangeRole = currentUserRole === 'admin' && !isOwner && !isSelf;
                    const clickableClass = canChangeRole ? 'clickable' : '';

                    // Dropdown options (show the other role option)
                    const otherRole = memberRole === 'admin' ? 'member' : 'admin';
                    const otherRoleLabel = otherRole === 'admin' ? 'Admin' : 'Member';
                    const dropdownHtml = canChangeRole ? `
                        <div class="role-dropdown">
                            <div class="role-dropdown-item" data-role="${otherRole}" data-email="${escapeHtml(member.email)}">
                                ${otherRoleLabel}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    ` : '';

                    // Wrap role badge and dropdown in a positioned container
                    const roleBadgeHtml = canChangeRole ? `
                        <div class="role-badge-wrapper">
                            <span class="role-badge ${badgeClass} ${clickableClass}" data-role-email="${escapeHtml(member.email)}" data-is-owner="${isOwner}">
                                ${roleLabel}
                                <svg class="role-badge-chevron" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M12 6L8 10L4 6" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                            </span>
                            ${dropdownHtml}
                        </div>
                    ` : `
                        <span class="role-badge ${badgeClass}" data-is-owner="${isOwner}">
                            ${roleLabel}
                        </span>
                    `;

                    return `
                        <tr data-member-id="${member.id}" class="${noDeleteClass}">
                            <td>
                                <div class="member-cell">
                                    <div class="avatar">${getInitials(member.email.split('@')[0])}</div>
                                    <span class="email">${escapeHtml(member.email)}</span>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                            <td class="role-td">
                                ${roleBadgeHtml}
                            </td>
                            <td class="status-td">
                                <span class="role-inline-mobile">${roleBadgeHtml}</span>
                                <span class="status-badge ${member.status}">${STATUS_LABELS[member.status] || member.status}</span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <button class="delete-btn" data-delete-id="${member.id}" title="Remove member">
                                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                                        <path d="M13.1667 5.83331V13.8333C13.1667 14.1869 13.0262 14.5261 12.7761 14.7761C12.5261 15.0262 12.187 15.1666 11.8333 15.1666H3.83333C3.47971 15.1666 3.14057 15.0262 2.89052 14.7761C2.64048 14.5261 2.5 14.1869 2.5 13.8333V5.83331" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                                        <path d="M0.5 3.16669H15.1667" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                                        <path d="M5.1665 3.16667V0.5H10.4998V3.16667" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                                        <path d="M9.8335 7.8233L5.8335 11.8233" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                                        <path d="M9.8335 11.8233L5.8335 7.8233" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                                    </svg>
                                </button>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    `;
                }).join('');

                // Update UI state (buttons, empty state, etc.)
                updateUIState();
            }

            // Update seats counter
            function updateSeatsCounter() {
                let html;
                if (seatsInfo.unlimited) {
                    html = `<span class="used-count">${seatsInfo.used}</span> seat${seatsInfo.used !== 1 ? 's' : ''} used (unlimited)`;
                } else {
                    html = `<span class="used-count">${seatsInfo.used}</span> of ${seatsInfo.total} seats used`;
                }

                seatsCounterEl.innerHTML = html;
                if (seatsCounterMobileEl) {
                    seatsCounterMobileEl.innerHTML = html;
                }
            }

            // Get available seats
            function getAvailableSeats() {
                if (seatsInfo.unlimited) return Infinity;
                return seatsInfo.total - seatsInfo.used;
            }

            // Show modal
            function showModal() {
                const available = getAvailableSeats();
                if (seatsInfo.unlimited) {
                    modalSeatsEl.textContent = `Unlimited seats available.`;
                } else if (available > 0) {
                    modalSeatsEl.textContent = `You have ${available} seat${available !== 1 ? 's' : ''} available.`;
                } else {
                    const price = seatsInfo.pricePerSeat;
                    if (price > 0) {
                        modalSeatsEl.textContent = `No seats available. Adding a member will cost $${price}/seat.`;
                    } else {
                        modalSeatsEl.textContent = `No seats available. Adding a member will incur additional costs.`;
                    }
                }
                emailInputEl.value = '';
                modalSendBtnEl.disabled = true;
                modalEl.classList.add('visible');
                emailInputEl.focus();
            }

            // Hide modal
            function hideModal() {
                modalEl.classList.remove('visible');
                modalSendBtnEl.disabled = true;
                modalSendBtnEl.textContent = 'Send invites';
                emailInputEl.value = '';
                emailDuplicatesEl.style.display = 'none';
            }

            // Validate email
            function isValidEmail(email) {
                return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email);
            }

            function parseEmails(input) {
                return input.split(',').map(e => e.trim()).filter(e => e.length > 0);
            }

            function areAllValidEmails(input) {
                const emails = parseEmails(input);
                return emails.length > 0 && emails.every(isValidEmail);
            }

            function findDuplicateEmails(input) {
                const emails = parseEmails(input);
                const existingEmails = membersData.map(m => m.email.toLowerCase());
                return emails.filter(e => existingEmails.includes(e.toLowerCase()));
            }

            function validateEmailInput() {
                const value = emailInputEl.value.trim();
                const validFormat = areAllValidEmails(value);
                const emails = value ? parseEmails(value) : [];
                const errors = [];

                // Check existing members
                const existingEmails = membersData.map(m => m.email.toLowerCase());
                const duplicates = emails.filter(e => existingEmails.includes(e.toLowerCase()));
                if (duplicates.length > 0) {
                    errors.push(duplicates.map(e =>
                        '<span style="font-weight:500;">' + escapeHtml(e) + '</span>'
                    ).join(', ') + (duplicates.length === 1 ? ' is already a member' : ' are already members'));
                }

                // Check duplicate entries in input
                const seen = {};
                const inputDupes = [];
                emails.forEach(e => {
                    const lower = e.toLowerCase();
                    if (seen[lower]) { if (!inputDupes.includes(lower)) inputDupes.push(e); }
                    else seen[lower] = true;
                });
                if (inputDupes.length > 0) {
                    errors.push(inputDupes.map(e =>
                        '<span style="font-weight:500;">' + escapeHtml(e) + '</span>'
                    ).join(', ') + ' entered more than once');
                }

                // Check seats limit
                const available = getAvailableSeats();
                const uniqueNew = emails.filter(e => !existingEmails.includes(e.toLowerCase()));
                const uniqueNewSet = [...new Set(uniqueNew.map(e => e.toLowerCase()))];
                if (uniqueNewSet.length > available) {
                    errors.push('Not enough seats — ' + uniqueNewSet.length + ' invited but only ' + available + ' available');
                }

                if (errors.length > 0) {
                    emailDuplicatesEl.innerHTML = errors.join('<br>');
                    emailDuplicatesEl.style.display = 'block';
                    modalSendBtnEl.disabled = true;
                } else {
                    emailDuplicatesEl.style.display = 'none';
                    modalSendBtnEl.disabled = !validFormat;
                }
            }

            // Escape HTML to prevent XSS
            function escapeHtml(text) {
                const div = document.createElement('div');
                div.textContent = text;
                return div.innerHTML;
            }

            // Initialize component with data
            function initialize(data) {
                // Close any open modals on re-init
                hideModal();
                hideEditOrgModal();

                // Store data
                membersData = data.members || [];
                const minSeats = data.minSeats || 1;
                const isUnlimited = data.totalSeats === -1;
                seatsInfo = {
                    total: isUnlimited ? Infinity : Math.max(data.totalSeats || 0, minSeats),
                    used: membersData.length,
                    pricePerSeat: isUnlimited ? 0 : (data.pricePerSeat || 0),
                    minSeats: minSeats,
                    unlimited: isUnlimited
                };

                // Set org name if provided
                if (data.orgName !== undefined) {
                    orgName = data.orgName;
                }

                // Store owner email
                if (data.ownerEmail) ownerEmail = data.ownerEmail;

                // Store current user email
                if (data.currentUserEmail) currentUserEmail = data.currentUserEmail;

                // Toggle role-based visibility
                currentUserRole = data.currentUserRole || 'admin';
                if (currentUserRole === 'member') {
                    appRootEl.classList.add('role-member');
                } else {
                    appRootEl.classList.remove('role-member');
                }

                // Update org name displays
                updateOrgNameDisplays();

                // Attach event listeners (only once)
                if (!isInitialized) {
                    // Edit org button click - open modal (desktop)
                    editOrgBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        showEditOrgModal();
                    });

                    // Edit org button click - open modal (mobile)
                    document.getElementById('edit-org-btn-mobile').addEventListener('click', () => {
                        showEditOrgModal();
                    });

                    // Edit org modal close button
                    editOrgModalCloseBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        hideEditOrgModal();
                    });

                    // Edit org modal cancel button
                    editOrgCancelBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        hideEditOrgModal();
                    });

                    // Edit org modal overlay click
                    editOrgModalEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        if (e.target === editOrgModalEl) {
                            hideEditOrgModal();
                        }
                    });

                    // Org name validation
                    function validateOrgName() {
                        const val = orgNameInputEl.value.trim();
                        if (val.length === 0) {
                            orgNameErrorEl.style.display = 'none';
                            editOrgSaveBtnEl.disabled = true;
                            return false;
                        }
                        if (val.length < 2) {
                            orgNameErrorEl.textContent = 'Name must be at least 2 characters';
                            orgNameErrorEl.style.display = 'block';
                            editOrgSaveBtnEl.disabled = true;
                            return false;
                        }
                        orgNameErrorEl.style.display = 'none';
                        editOrgSaveBtnEl.disabled = false;
                        return true;
                    }

                    orgNameInputEl.addEventListener('input', validateOrgName);

                    // Edit org save button
                    editOrgSaveBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        if (!validateOrgName()) return;
                        const newName = orgNameInputEl.value.trim();
                        const oldName = orgName;
                        orgName = newName;
                        updateOrgNameDisplays();
                        hideEditOrgModal();

                        window.myop_cta_handler('org_name_changed', {
                            oldName: oldName,
                            newName: orgName
                        });
                    });

                    // Enter to save org name
                    orgNameInputEl.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                            e.preventDefault();
                            editOrgSaveBtnEl.click();
                        } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                            hideEditOrgModal();
                        }
                    });

                    // Breadcrumb parent click - navigate back to org settings
                    document.querySelector('.breadcrumb-parent').addEventListener('click', () => {
                        window.myop_cta_handler('navigate_org_settings', {});
                    });

                    // Header invite button click - open modal (desktop)
                    inviteBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        showModal();
                    });

                    // Invite button click - open modal (mobile)
                    document.getElementById('invite-btn-mobile').addEventListener('click', () => {
                        showModal();
                    });

                    // Table invite button click - open modal (for single member state)
                    tableInviteBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        showModal();
                    });

                    // Empty state invite button click - open modal
                    emptyStateInviteBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        showModal();
                    });

                    // Modal close button
                    modalCloseBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        hideModal();
                    });

                    // Modal cancel button
                    modalCancelBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        hideModal();
                    });

                    // Modal overlay click (close when clicking outside)
                    modalEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        if (e.target === modalEl) {
                            hideModal();
                        }
                    });

                    // Email input validation
                    emailInputEl.addEventListener('input', validateEmailInput);

                    // Send invites button
                    modalSendBtnEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const value = emailInputEl.value.trim();
                        if (!areAllValidEmails(value)) return;

                        // Disable button while sending
                        modalSendBtnEl.disabled = true;
                        modalSendBtnEl.textContent = 'Sending...';

                        const emails = parseEmails(value);

                        window.myop_cta_handler('invite_members', { emails });
                    });

                    // Close all dropdowns when clicking outside
                    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        const openDropdowns = document.querySelectorAll('.role-dropdown.visible');
                        const openBadges = document.querySelectorAll('.role-badge.open');
                        openDropdowns.forEach(d => d.classList.remove('visible'));
                        openBadges.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('open'));
                    });

                    // Member row click (event delegation)
                    tbodyEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        // Role badge click
                        const roleBadge = e.target.closest('.role-badge.clickable');
                        if (roleBadge) {
                            e.stopPropagation();

                            // Close other dropdowns
                            document.querySelectorAll('.role-dropdown.visible').forEach(d => {
                                if (d !== roleBadge.nextElementSibling) {
                                    d.classList.remove('visible');
                                }
                            });
                            document.querySelectorAll('.role-badge.open').forEach(b => {
                                if (b !== roleBadge) {
                                    b.classList.remove('open');
                                }
                            });

                            // Toggle dropdown (now inside wrapper)
                            const wrapper = roleBadge.closest('.role-badge-wrapper');
                            if (wrapper) {
                                const dropdown = wrapper.querySelector('.role-dropdown');
                                if (dropdown) {
                                    dropdown.classList.toggle('visible');
                                    roleBadge.classList.toggle('open');
                                }
                            }
                            return;
                        }

                        // Role dropdown item click
                        const dropdownItem = e.target.closest('.role-dropdown-item');
                        if (dropdownItem) {
                            e.stopPropagation();
                            const newRole = dropdownItem.dataset.role;
                            const email = dropdownItem.dataset.email;
                            const member = membersData.find(m => m.email === email);
                            if (!member) return;

                            const oldRole = member.role || 'admin';

                            // Prevent demoting the last admin (owner always counts as admin)
                            if (oldRole === 'admin' && newRole === 'member') {
                                const adminCount = membersData.filter(m => {
                                    if (ownerEmail && m.email === ownerEmail) return true;
                                    return (m.role || 'admin') === 'admin';
                                }).length;
                                if (adminCount <= 1) {
                                    window.myop_cta_handler('error', { message: 'Organization must have at least one admin' });
                                    // Close dropdown
                                    document.querySelectorAll('.role-dropdown.visible').forEach(d => d.classList.remove('visible'));
                                    document.querySelectorAll('.role-badge.open').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('open'));
                                    return;
                                }
                            }

                            // Close dropdown
                            document.querySelectorAll('.role-dropdown.visible').forEach(d => d.classList.remove('visible'));
                            document.querySelectorAll('.role-badge.open').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('open'));

                            // Optimistic update
                            member.role = newRole;
                            renderMembers();

                            window.myop_cta_handler('role_changed', {
                                email,
                                role: newRole,
                                member
                            });
                            return;
                        }

                        const deleteBtn = e.target.closest('.delete-btn');
                        if (deleteBtn) {
                            e.stopPropagation();

                            // Check if this is the single admin (can't delete)
                            const row = deleteBtn.closest('tr');
                            if (row && row.classList.contains('no-delete')) {
                                return; // Don't allow deletion
                            }

                            const memberId = deleteBtn.dataset.deleteId;
                            const member = membersData.find(m => m.id === memberId);

                            // Remove member from data
                            membersData = membersData.filter(m => m.id !== memberId);
                            seatsInfo.used = membersData.length;

                            // Reduce total seats if above minimum
                            if (seatsInfo.total > seatsInfo.minSeats && seatsInfo.total > seatsInfo.used) {
                                seatsInfo.total = Math.max(seatsInfo.minSeats, seatsInfo.used);
                            }

                            // Update UI
                            updateSeatsCounter();
                            renderMembers();

                            // Notify host
                            window.myop_cta_handler('member_deleted', {
                                memberId,
                                member
                            });
                            return;
                        }

                        const row = e.target.closest('tr[data-member-id]');
                        if (row) {
                            const memberId = row.dataset.memberId;
                            const member = membersData.find(m => m.id === memberId);
                            window.myop_cta_handler('member_clicked', {
                                memberId,
                                member
                            });
                        }
                    });

                    isInitialized = true;
                }

                // Render
                updateSeatsCounter();
                renderMembers();
            }

            // Handle actions
            function handleAction(action, payload) {
                switch (action) {
                    case 'setData':
                        initialize(payload);
                        break;
                    case 'setOrgName':
                        orgName = payload.orgName || payload;
                        updateOrgNameDisplays();
                        break;
                    case 'addMember':
                        membersData.push(payload);
                        seatsInfo.used = membersData.length;
                        updateSeatsCounter();
                        renderMembers();
                        break;
                    case 'removeMember':
                        membersData = membersData.filter(m => m.id !== payload.memberId);
                        seatsInfo.used = membersData.length;
                        if (seatsInfo.total > seatsInfo.minSeats && seatsInfo.total > seatsInfo.used) {
                            seatsInfo.total = Math.max(seatsInfo.minSeats, seatsInfo.used);
                        }
                        updateSeatsCounter();
                        renderMembers();
                        break;
                    case 'updateMember':
                        const index = membersData.findIndex(m => m.id === payload.id);
                        if (index !== -1) {
                            membersData[index] = { ...membersData[index], ...payload };
                            updateSeatsCounter();
                            renderMembers();
                        }
                        break;
                    default:
                        console.warn('[MembersSeats] Unknown action:', action);
                }
            }

            // Public API: Initialize or get state
            window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
                if (arguments.length === 0) {
                    return {
                        members: membersData,
                        totalSeats: seatsInfo.total,
                        usedSeats: seatsInfo.used,
                        minSeats: seatsInfo.minSeats,
                        pricePerSeat: seatsInfo.pricePerSeat,
                        orgName: orgName,
                        isDataLoaded: isDataLoaded
                    };
                }

                isDataLoaded = true;

                if (data.action) {
                    handleAction(data.action, data.payload);
                    return data;
                }

                initialize(data);
                return data;
            };

            // Public API: CTA handler (to be overridden by host)
            window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
                console.log('[MembersSeats CTA]', action_id, payload);
            };

            console.log('[MembersSeats] Component ready');
        })();
    </script>

    <!-- Mock data for preview -->
    <script id="myop_preview">
        const currentState = window.myop_init_interface();
        if (!currentState.isDataLoaded) {
            window.myop_init_interface({
                orgName: '',
                currentUserRole: 'admin',
                currentUserEmail: 'admin@company.com',
                ownerEmail: 'admin@company.com',
                members: [
                    {
                        id: 'member-1',
                        email: 'admin@company.com',
                        status: 'active',
                        role: 'admin'
                    }
                ],
                totalSeats: 1,
                minSeats: 1,
                pricePerSeat: 29
            });
        }
    </script>
</body>

</html>
